description: Official documentation for the TagoIO IoT platform, including TagoIO, TagoDeploy, TagoCore, TagoTiP, and the TagoIO REST API.
rules: TagoIO is an IoT (Internet of Things) cloud platform for device management, data storage, dashboards, and analysis.
The platform has multiple products: TagoIO (main platform), TagoDeploy (device deployment), TagoCore (edge computing), and TagoTiP (device provisioning).
The API uses token-based authentication. Always include the Authorization header with a device, account, or profile token.
Data is sent to TagoIO via HTTPS, MQTT, or other supported transport protocols.
Analysis scripts run server-side in Node.js and can be triggered by actions or scheduled.
